specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 (2.4 GHz or better)
  • Memory: 2048 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated Graphics (Intel HD 5000 or equivalent) with WebGL 2.0 support
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 300 MB available space

  • Additional Notes: Runs as an Electron desktop app. Requires internet connection to play multiplayer.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 (2.8 GHz) or AMD equivalent
  • Memory: 4096 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated GPU (NVIDIA GTX 750 / AMD Radeon R7 or better) for smoother 3D animations (dice / board effects)
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card
  • VR Support: Not supported
  • Additional Notes: Best experienced on mid-tier hardware or higher for fluid animations and multiplayer performance.
